title: Will Take Action Against Parents Of AJP's Kunki Chowdhury For Beef Consumption: Himanta
description: Consumption of beef is not illegal in the state, but the Assam Cattle Preservation Act, 2021, bans cattle slaughter and sale of beef in areas where Hindus, Jains and Sikhs are in majority, and in places within a five-km radius of a temple or satra (Vaishnavite monastery)
